title: Chemistry for Mortals: An atomic look around you
author: Wordsus Team
description: A fascinating 365-day journey through the world of chemistry. From the structure of the atom to the most modern applications of nanotechnology, explained in a simple and entertaining way.

chapters.title: The atom: the fundamental unit of all matter
chapters.description: Discover what atoms are, how they are formed inside and why understanding their structure is essential to understanding all the chemistry that surrounds us.

chapters.title: States of matter: solids, liquids and gases
chapters.description: Learn the characteristics that differentiate solids, liquids and gases, and how changes in temperature affect molecular behavior.

chapters.title: The water anomaly: why ice manages to float
chapters.description: Water has unique and essential properties for life. We analyze its curious molecular structure and the reason why ice is less dense.

chapters.title: Introduction to the periodic table of the elements
chapters.description: We explore how the chemical elements are arranged in the periodic table, their fascinating history, and what information we can glean from each little box.

chapters.title: Metals vs. Non-Metals: Basic Differences
chapters.description: Discover the marked chemical differences between metals and non-metals, their varied physical properties, and how they interact with each other in nature.
